pass_blockers: source_traceability dimension scored 70, below the 75 threshold (per audit-framework.md §5, this dimension is non-negotiable for Apex pages)

findings.issue: ₹2,500 Cr platform GMV claim is off by ~10×; Unlocking Growth deck slide 25 says $2.5 B which is ~₹20,000 Cr.
findings.fix: Replace '₹ 2,500 Cr' with '$ 2.5 B' or '~₹ 20,000 Cr'.

findings.issue: '79 channels live' overclaims; source says 68 of 79 are live (5 in progress, 5 in planning). Same page's §10 PLATFORMS array correctly says '79 channels · 68 live'.
findings.fix: Replace both occurrences with '79 channels · 68 live'.

findings.issue: Page asserts '25 platforms' in 4 places but the PLATFORMS JS array on the same page contains 27 entries; §10 grid renders '27 of 27 platforms shown'. Predates this redesign but the redesign surfaces the inconsistency more.
findings.fix: Three options: (1) update copy to '27' everywhere; (2) drop the 5 'context' entries from PLATFORMS (/culture, /organisation, /autonomous, /agents, /ai-native) so the count truly is 25; (3) reframe as '25 platforms + 2 context pages'. Needs a product call.

findings.issue: '11.06 L POs automated' conflates two source metrics: Unlocking Growth slide 6 says '460k+ POs automated' (4.6 L); '11.06 L POs FY26' (from /impetus PLATFORMS metric) is total POs FY26 — not specifically 'automated'.
findings.fix: Either '460 K+ POs automated' (deck-aligned) or '11.06 L POs FY 26' (drop 'automated' qualifier). Don't combine.

findings.issue: Hero number says '6 · Builds · live for Reliance' but Retail Jarvis tile carries a BUILD pill (not live). 5 of 6 are LIVE, 1 is BUILD. Caption wording overclaims by 1.
findings.fix: Change caption to '6 · Builds for Reliance' (drop 'live') OR '5 Live · 1 in Build · for Reliance'.

findings.issue: `.impact-tile { padding: 32px 28px; ... }` — 28px horizontal padding is off the design.md §1.3 padding rhythm (4/8 scale; card padding must be 16/20/24/32).
findings.fix: Change to `padding: 32px;` (uniform p-8) and consider using Tailwind class `card p-8` instead of a custom rule.

findings.issue: '70+ other formats' drift; existing /ucp/ page and /ucp PLATFORMS metric on this same page say '75+ formats'.
findings.fix: Replace '70+ other formats' with '75+ formats' to match existing canonical number.

findings.issue: section-label has `style="display: inline-block;"` inline override to keep the §-prefix from breaking out of the centered parent — code smell.
findings.fix: Remove the inline override; wrap label in a centered flex/block container instead.

strengths: Section-label discipline — all 10 labels render as a perfect contiguous numeric run (01-10, no skips).
Zero banned vocabulary — no transformative/world-class/cutting-edge/unlocks/enables/empowers anywhere in user-facing copy.
No `we / our` first-person plural and no exclamation marks. No §Sources block. No internal source-document refs (no 'slide N', 'p. N', 'Accenture sN').
Pill discipline — only documented variants used (.pill-live × 23, .pill-build × 4, .pill-pilot × 1, .pill-phase2 × 1). No invented variants.

Design-system inheritance executed cleanly — zero new hex literals; all custom font-sizes on the documented scale; alternating --bg/--bg-soft section rhythm honoured; new .section-hero-split correctly scoped to page-level <style> per design.md §3.

console_messages: Tailwind CDN dev warning (acceptable per visual-audit-checklist)
verification_run.deep_link_filter_works: Yes — #explore?filter=special-projects activates chip + renders 7 of 27 cards
